productDisplayName: Nike Women Graphic Play Red Bag
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this red Graphic Play handbag from nike will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or college. With a great silhouette and lots of space to accomodate all your essentials, you will notice that people will be unable to keep their eyes away from it!MeasurementHeight: 33 cmWidth: 46 cmDepth: 11 cmCapacity: 25 litresMade of 100% polyester with 84% nylon and 16% polyester lining for durability and comfortOne roomy zippered compartmentTwo small mesh inner pouches to stow away essentialsnike's punch line printed all over for branding and added attractionNike Swosh printed on the frontshort handles with stitch detailing for ease of carryingDetachable zippered mobile pouch on handle with printed Nike SwooshBranded zippers and sliders for easy use CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
